english_query: It looks like what is good is not put into parts right by the good, the help, and the kind. Because what is good is put into ten kinds, as the old teacher who can think well says. But the good, the help, and the kind can all be found under one kind. So what is good is not put into parts right by those three.
ugf_response: What is good, as far as it is the same as what a thing really is, is cut into ten kinds. But this cut is part of it because that is the right way it works.

english_query: Also, as said before, what god really is is just being. But being seems very not good, because it is found in everything and can take on any change. So god is not good.
ugf_response: Being is the most good of all things, because it is what makes things real; for nothing is real unless it is. So being makes all things real, even their shapes. So being is not like the thing that gets filled, but like the thing that fills. So when I talk about the being of a man, or a horse, or anything else, being is seen as what gives the shape, and as something taken in; and not as the thing that is.

english_query: May not this be the reason, the man who knows about gods, why I am said to be wrong about the big spirit--that I cannot get rid of these stories about the big spirits? and so I suppose that people think I am wrong. But, as you who know a lot about them like them, I cannot do better than agree with your big knowing. What else can I say, saying as I do, that I know nothing about them? Tell me, for the love of the big spirit, whether you really believe that they are true.
ugf_response: Yes, the old teacher; and things more big still, of which the world does not know.

english_query: Also, because time is the outside way we count things that are made, place is the same. So place, just like time, must be counted as one of the first things that were made.
ugf_response: Place is thought to be in the high sky, which is the edge of all space. Because place talks about things that always stay, it was made all at once. But time does not always stay, so it was made at its start: we can only feel a part of time that is the now.

english_query: We will know better, my good friend, in a little while. The point which I should first wish to understand is whether the good way is loved by the gods because it is the good way, or the good way because it is loved by the gods.
ugf_response: I do not understand your meaning, old teacher.

english_query: Also, the way we count the first moving thing is the way we count every moving thing. So the way we count the first being is the way we count every being. But forever is the way we count the first being, which is god. So forever is the way we count every being. But the being of things that end is counted by time. So time is either forever or a part of forever.
ugf_response: As forever is the right way to count being that stays the same, so time is the right way to count moving; and so, as any being moves away from staying the same and changes, it moves away from forever and comes under time. So the being of things that end, because it changes, is not counted by forever, but by time; for time counts not only things that are moving, but also things that can move; so it counts not only moving, but also resting, which belongs to things that can move but are not moving now.

english_query: Also, talking is what a living thing does, for it comes from the voice, and the voice is a sound from the mouth. But many parts of the book to do with god show that the good spirits talked in bodies they took on. So in those bodies they did things that living things do.
ugf_response: In the right way, the good spirits do not talk through the bodies they took on; but there is a look of talking, in that they make sounds in the air like human voices.

english_query: It looks like the thing that makes life is not made from extra food, but from the true stuff of the parent. For an old teacher says that making life is the work of the world, taking from the true stuff of the parent to make the child. But the child comes from the thing that makes life. So the thing that makes life comes from the true stuff of the parent.
ugf_response: Making life uses the true stuff of the parent in living things, because the thing that makes life gets its power from the shape of the parent, and because it can become that stuff.

english_query: It seems there are not many who in god. For a who is the one true thing of a thinking kind. So if there are many who in god, there must be many true things; and this looks wrong.
ugf_response: The word who has true thing in it, not as what it is to be, but as the one thing made clear by saying one. To show this true thing, old teachers use a different word. So we say three who, and they say three of that other word. We do not say three true things, for fear people think we mean three what-it-is-to-be, because the word true thing can mean two things.

english_query: Also, we can only learn about things to do with god by our own mind through pictures in our head; and this is true for what we get by the help of god too. For a teacher from long ago says it is not possible for the light of god to touch us unless it is covered by many colorful things to do with god. So we cannot know god better by the help of god than by our own mind.
ugf_response: From pictures, whether we get them from our eyes in the normal way, or god puts them in our mind, we get better thinking the stronger the light of understanding is in us; and so through the telling given by the pictures, a fuller knowing is got by the pouring in of the light of god.

english_query: Also, free choice means being able to pick between two ways. But the bright spirits do not have this power in their thinking; because, as was said before, their thinking is not wrong about things they can know by their own power. So they cannot have free choice in their wanting part either.
ugf_response: As was said before, knowing happens when the thing known is inside the one who knows. It is a mark of not having all parts in anything not to have inside it what it should have by its own power. So a bright spirit would not have all parts in what it is, if its thinking were not set to every true thing it can know by its own power. But the act of the wanting part comes from this, that the feeling is pointed at something outside. Yet having all parts in a thing does not come from everything it is drawn to, but only from something higher than it. So it does not show not having all parts in a bright spirit if its will is not set about things lower than it; but it would show not having all parts in it, if it were not set about what is higher than it.

english_query: I think that what you are saying, old teacher, is very true.
ugf_response: But if this is true, then the good people are not good by the way things are?

english_query: It looks like there is no three in god. Because every name for god means what he is or how he is tied. But this name 'three' does not mean what he is; if it did, we would say it of each one: nor does it mean how he is tied; for it does not show a tie to another. So the word 'three' is not used for god.
ugf_response: By its old meaning, this word 'three' seems to mean the one true being of the three ones, as if it means three-in-one. But in its clear meaning it rather means the count of the ones who share one true being; and for this reason we cannot say the father is the three, as he is not three ones. Yet it does not mean the ties themselves of the ones, but rather the count of ones tied to each other; and so it is that the word itself does not show a look to another.

english_query: It looks like perfect means having no gone parts. But the human body does not have as many parts as the bodies of other animals, because those animals have skin and own parts that keep them safe, which a person does not have. So the human body is not set up well.
ugf_response: Hard points and hard ends, which some animals use to stay safe, and thick skin and lots of hair or soft hairs, which animals wear as cover, show that those animals have a lot of earth stuff; that does not fit the even and soft feel of a person. So those things are not a good fit for a person. Instead, a person has thinking and hands that can make things that help do work and clothes and other things needed for life in many kinds. That is why people say the hand is the part of parts. This fits better with the thinking kind of a person, which can think of many things and make many things.

english_query: Also, what happens shows only its own start. But the start of living things is part of the same kind, and not part of the ways we call the three together different and count them. So in a living thing we find a sign not of the three together but of one true kind.
ugf_response: The ways the three together move are also in some way the start and kind of making things; as we see from the earlier.

english_query: It looks like being good does not have the end part, but has other parts. Because people talk that being good is talked about as being nice to see. But being nice to see has the part of what something is. So being good has the part of what something is.
ugf_response: Being nice to see and being good are the same kind of thing, because both come from the same what something is. That is why people talk about being good as being nice to see. But they work in different ways. Being good is about want, and want is a kind of end, so being good has the end part. Being nice to see is about the eye, because nice to see things make the eye happy when they are in a right size. The eye is a kind of mind, like all mind. Since what is known comes from seeing, and being like is about what something is, being nice to see belongs to the what something is part.

english_query: The great old church teacher says that when we look for the three-in-one in our mind, we look in the whole mind, not making a break between thinking about now and thinking about forever. So the mark of the three-in-one is in the mind, even for things of now.
ugf_response: We can see a kind of three-in-one in the whole mind, but not by needing a third thing other than thinking about now and thinking about forever, as he says. But in the part of thought that is about now, even if a three-in-one is there, the mark of God is not seen there, because knowing things of now is added to the mind. Also, the ways we know things of now are not always there; sometimes they are working, sometimes only in memory. This is true for trust, which comes for this life; in the next life, trust will end, only the memory of it will stay.

english_query: Also, we say things are the same when they share the same look. But nothing can share its look with god; for, except in god alone, what a thing is and that it is are different. So no made thing can be the same as god.
ugf_response: We do not say made things are the same as god because they share the same kind of look, but only because they point to god in a certain way; god is being itself, while other things have being by sharing in it.

english_query: Also, the mind when it is working is the thing being known, just as the sense when it is working is the thing being sensed. This happens because the sense gets the look of the thing seen, and the mind gets the look of the thing understood. So if god is seen by the made mind when it is working, he must be seen by some look.
ugf_response: What god is is being itself. So just as other things known that are not being itself join to the mind by some thing that makes the mind know and work; so what god is joins to the made mind, as the thing actually known, making the mind work by and of itself.

english_query: It seems that the shapes of bodies come from the spirit helpers. For the old teacher says: 'From shapes not in stuff come shapes in stuff.' But shapes not in stuff are spirits, and shapes in stuff are body shapes. So body shapes come from spirits.
ugf_response: By shapes not in stuff, the old teacher means the kinds in the mind of the maker. So the church writer says: 'By trust we see the world was made by the word of the maker; from things we cannot see, things we can see were made.' But if by shapes not in stuff he means the spirit helpers, we say body shapes come from them, not by moving out, but by moving.

english_query: Also, this is shown by the old teacher, who says that being which stands on its own comes before life which stands on its own, and before what it means to think well which stands on its own.
ugf_response: As the old teacher says, when he speaks of life and what it means to think well that stand on their own, he sometimes means God himself, and sometimes the powers given to things; but he does not mean things that stand on their own, as the old people said.

english_query: Also, where there is a order, there is also a way things are not the same. But there is no way things are not the same in the god way of being. So it does not have a order; and a order of how things come to be is not in it.
ugf_response: The order of how things come to be does not mean putting the way of being itself in a line, but means that there is an order in the god persons because of how they start to be.

english_query: Then is being good good for you?
ugf_response: That is the only thing to think.

english_query: Also, a thing that lives is better than a thing that just is; and a thing that thinks is better than a thing that just lives. So living is better than just being; and knowing is better than living. But what god really is, is just being itself. So he does not have the good parts of living, and knowing, and other such good parts.
ugf_response: The old man who taught well says that even though being is better than living, and living is better than knowing, if we think of them as not the same thing; still, a living thing is better than one that just is, because living things also are, and thinking things also are and live. So even though being does not hold living and knowing, because a thing that has being does not need to have every kind of being; still the being of god holds living and knowing inside it, because he who is being itself is missing no good part of being.

english_query: Also, if a set place was needed for man to live, this need would come from either the soul or the body. If from the soul, the place would be in the sky, which fits the soul; since all want the sky. If from the body, there was no need for any place other than what other animals have. So the happy place was not fit for man to live in.
ugf_response: It is wrong to say any set place is right for the soul or any spirit, though a place may fit spirits in some way. For the earth happy place was fit for man, for both body and soul; that is, because in his soul was the power that kept the man body from going bad. This cannot be said of other animals. So, as an old teacher who knew much says: 'No animal that does not think lived in the happy place'; although, by a special choice, god brought animals there to the first man; and the bad animal could go there with the help of the bad spirit.

english_query: Also, the great old teacher said that doing things comes before the power to do them. But getting the idea is a doing that is not the same as other doings of the mind. An old man who can think well from far away said that the first move is called getting the idea; that getting the idea about a certain thing is called wanting to know; that which stays and fits the soul to what is known is called finding it; and finding it when it stays in the same man, looking at and checking itself, is called being good at making right calls; and being good at making right calls if it grows makes thought, which is right talk inside; from which, they say, comes talk said with the tongue. So it seems that getting the idea is a special power.
ugf_response: All those doings that the old man who can think well from far away tells us about belong to one power, which is the mind power. For this power first just sees something; and this doing is called getting the idea. Second, it points what it sees to knowing something else, or to some work; and this is called wanting to know. And when it goes on to look for what it wants to know, it is called finding it. When, by looking at something known for sure, it checks what it found, it is said to know or to be good at making right calls, which belongs to being good at making right calls; for it is for the man who is good at making right calls to check, as the great old teacher said. And when once it has something for sure, as being checked all the way, it thinks about the way to make it known to others; and this is the ordering of talk inside, from which comes talk outside. For every different doing does not make the powers change, but only what cannot be put back to the one same start, as we said before.

english_query: Also, things that do not need each other do not seem to have one way to count their time; for there seems to be one time for all things that happen in time; since the first moving thing, which time counts, is in some way the cause of all moving things. But things that last for ever do not need each other, for one spirit is not the cause of another spirit. So there is not just one way to count their time.
ugf_response: For things to be counted by one thing, it is not needed that this one thing is the cause of all, but that it is simpler than the rest.

english_query: Tell me what the way things are of this idea is, and then I will have a way to check, and by which I can look at things people do, if they are done by you or by any other person, and then I will be able to say that this thing is right for the gods and that thing is not right for the gods.
ugf_response: I will tell you, if you want.

english_query: It looks like there are other parts of the soul in man that are not the same kind as the part that lets us think, like the part that lets us feel and the part that lets us grow. Because things that can end and things that cannot end are not the same thing. But the part that lets us think cannot end; while the other parts, like the one for feeling and the one for growing, can end, as was shown before. So in man, what the thinking part really is, what the feeling part really is, and what the growing part really is, cannot be the same.
ugf_response: The feeling part does not end, not because it is a feeling part, but because it is part of the thinking power. So, when a soul is only for feeling, it can end; but when it has feeling and also the power to think, it cannot end. For although feeling does not make something last forever, it does not stop the thinking power from lasting forever.

english_query: It looks like a person can change body stuff with the power of their mind. Because an old teacher said good people do big signs sometimes by asking for help, sometimes by their own power. So one man asked for help to wake up a dead woman, and he made liars die by his own power. But these big signs change body stuff. So people can change body stuff with the power of their mind.
ugf_response: Good people are said to do big signs by the power of the gift from the high one, not by the power of how things are made. This is clear from what the old teacher said in the same place: Those who are children of the high one, with power, as one man said--what is strange that they do big signs with that power?

english_query: And now, my friend, as you are already beginning to be a person everyone sees, and are telling me to be one too, let us ask each other a few things. Tell me, the strong man who tells people what to do, what about making any of the people better? Was there ever a man who was once bad, or not right, or out of control, or not able to think well, and became good and great by the help of the strong man who tells people what to do? Was there ever such a man, whether from the city or from far away, owned by someone or free? Tell me, the strong man who tells people what to do, if someone were to ask these things of you, what would you say? Who would you say that you made better by talking? There may have been good things of this sort which were done by you as a person not seen by all, before you came out for everyone to see. Why will you not answer?
ugf_response: You like to fight with words, the old teacher.

english_query: And the good things you mean are like being well, having lots of money, having gold and silver, and having a job and being well known in the city--those are what you would call good things?
ugf_response: Yes, I would put all those in.

english_query: For real old teacher, I cannot answer; my only idea is that these things, not like what we see with eyes, do not have a special body part, but that the mind, by its own power, looks at the big ideas in all things.
ugf_response: You are very nice bright young one, and not not nice, as the other man was saying; for he who says nice things is himself nice and good. And also being nice, you have done me a good thing in letting me stop a very long talk, if you are sure that the soul looks at some things by itself and others through the body parts. For that was my own idea, and I wanted you to agree with me.

english_query: Yes, for sure.
ugf_response: Well, if you are ready to go on, tell me this: there is something, I think, that you would call what someone knows?

english_query: I am not only out of heart, but in sad; for I do not know what to answer if anyone asks me: the bright young one, have you really found that a wrong idea comes not from looking at sense with each other nor from the mind, but from mind and sense together? Yes, I will say, with the happy feeling of one who thinks he has made a good find.
ugf_response: I see no reason we should feel bad about our show, the old teacher.

english_query: We may leave the small parts of their way of thinking not looked at, but we must not forget to ask them the only thing we care about: Are all things moving and changing?
ugf_response: Yes, they will say.

english_query: Also, in things that go together but are not the same in being, one can be without the other; like something that can be known can be there without it being known, as the old teacher says. But things that go with god and made things are not the same in being. So we can say god has a tie to made things even if they are not there; and so we can call god 'head' and 'maker' from the very start, not just in time.
ugf_response: To see if things that go together are the same in being or not, we do not need to look at the order of the things they belong to, but at what the tie itself means. If one thing in its meaning holds the other, and the other holds the first, then they are the same in being: like two times as much and half, or dad and son, and such. But if one thing in its meaning holds the other, and not the other way, they are not the same in being. This is true for knowing and what is known; for what can be known is seen as able to be known, and knowing is a way of being or doing. So what can be known, in how we speak of it, is before knowing, but if we see that thing as being known, then it is the same in being as knowing in doing; for the thing known is nothing as such unless it is known. So, even though god is before made things, because the meaning of 'head' holds the idea of one who serves and the other way around, these two words, 'head' and 'one who serves,' are the same in being. So, god was not 'head' until he had a made thing under him.

english_query: Also, some living things come from going bad, which is a kind of breaking down. But breaking down goes against the first making of the world. So such living things should not have been made at that time.
ugf_response: Since making one thing is breaking down another, it was not against the first making of things that better things should come from the breaking down of less good things. So living things that come from the breaking down of things that do not live, or of green things, could have been made then. But those that come from the breaking down of living things could not have been made then except as a way they could be.

english_query: It looks like god did not make the first human body all by himself. The great old church teacher says that god uses spirit helpers to get things done with bodies. But the first human body was made from body stuff. So the spirit helpers did the work, and god did not do it all by himself.
ugf_response: Even though spirit helpers help god with body things, god can do some body things that are too big for spirit helpers, like waking up dead people or helping people who cannot see. With this big power, god made the first human body from the wet ground. Still, the spirit helpers could help by getting the ground ready, just like they will help by gathering the dust when people wake up at the end.

english_query: Also, anyone who gets light in their mind knows they are getting it. But people do not know they are getting this light from the spirits that have no body. So they do not get it from the spirits that have no body.
ugf_response: Thinking and getting light in the mind can be seen in two ways. First, about the thing being seen; so anyone who sees or gets light knows they do, because they see the thing. Second, about the start of the power; so it does not follow that anyone who sees a true thing knows what the mind is, which is the power for thinking. In the same way, not everyone who gets light from a spirit that has no body knows they get it from him.
